description: A close/dismiss button for the off-canvas navigation menu, displaying a text label with a multiplication sign.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Close menu button as seen in the off-canvas navigation

notes: Appears on virtually every page as part of the Foundation off-canvas navigation. The data-close attribute is used by Foundation JS for modal/off-canvas dismissal — it should be hardcoded. The inner span always has aria-hidden='true'. Text is always 'Close menu ×' and aria-label is always 'Close menu' across all samples — these can be treated as defaults. The '×' character is a literal multiplication sign (×), not an HTML entity.
